field.label: Enable Aliaser
field.help: Enable the Aliaser daemon to monitor and sync alias tables.

field.label: Default Interval (seconds)
field.help: Default check interval for new watchers. Individual watchers can override this. Range: 10-3600 seconds.

field.label: Log Level
field.help: Daemon logging verbosity. Debug logs every DNS lookup; Info logs changes; Warning logs failures only.

field.label: Max Table Entries
field.help: Warn when any alias table exceeds this many entries. Set to 0 to disable.
